section_title: Making or possession of any instrument for counterfeiting a property mark
chapter_title: Of Offences Relating to Documents and to Property Marks
text: Whoever makes or has in his possession any die, plate or other instrument for the purpose of counterfeiting a proper mark, or has in his possession a property mark for the purpose of denoting that any goods belong to a person to whom they do not belong, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
